name: Press Conference
description: Clips and quotes from pre-match or post-match press conferences. Delivers the manager and player insights in an engaging social format.

key_quote.example: We are focused and ready. The players have shown incredible commitment this week in training.

guidelines: 30-90 second edited clip of the press conference. Lower third identifies the speaker with name and role. Subtitles are mandatory for accessibility and silent viewing. 16:9 for landscape (YouTube/Twitter) but also provide a 9:16 crop for Stories/Reels. Focus on the most quotable and newsworthy statements. Include the Dinamo press backdrop in frame. Post within 2 hours of the press conference.
